flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Manhattan College rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 ($21.6k → $26.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Manhattan College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (64.2% → 51.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Manhattan College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (77.1% → 63.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Manhattan College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2k → 2.7k).
